title: The Crow and the Pitcher
synopsis: A thirsty crow finds a pitcher with very little water inside. A story about using patience and clever thinking.
sentences: A thirsty Crow flew over the fields on a very hot day.
He looked everywhere for water, but every stream and puddle was dry.
At last, he saw a small pitcher standing near a garden wall.
The Crow landed beside it and peered inside with hope.
There was water in the pitcher, but the water sat too low for his beak to reach.
The Crow tried to push the pitcher over, but it was too heavy.
He stopped, looked around, and noticed many small stones on the ground.
One by one, he picked up the stones and dropped them into the pitcher.
Slowly, the water began to rise higher and higher.
The Crow kept working until the water reached the top.
Then he drank deeply and felt strong again.
By using patience and clever thinking, the Crow solved a problem that force could not solve.
